node.text: Joanna values the moments that bring happiness and remind her that life is great.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "rely cheer joy") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna reflects on the tough times finishing her screenplay and realizes that the joyful moments make the journey worth it.

node.text: Joanna cherishes the stuffed animal gifted to her by Nate with all her heart.
